summary: EverDuty Flex Supabase Migration Testing Complete. Backend: 36/36 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All three portals (Worker, Employer, Admin) verified working. MongoDB to Supabase PostgreSQL migration successful.
passed_tests: Auth: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 when no token provided
Auth: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
Worker: GET /api/worker/profile returns stats (47 shifts, 4.7 rating)
Frontend Worker: Login redirects to /worker dashboard
Frontend Worker: Dashboard shows stats (47 shifts done, £116 earned, £300 pending, 4.7 rating)
Frontend Worker: Referrals nav works - shows referral code ED-JAME33F6
Frontend Worker: Academy nav works - shows 32+ courses
Frontend Employer: Login redirects to /employer dashboard
Frontend Employer: Dashboard shows 6 shifts, 4 permanent jobs, 1 applicant
Frontend Employer: Academy has My Courses tab with course creation
Frontend Admin: Login redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend Admin: Workers list shows James Thompson (ACTIVE, 47 shifts)
Frontend Admin: Finance shows total £416, platform revenue £17.40, 15% commission
Frontend Admin: Academy shows course catalog with Overview tab
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data in Supabase (6 shifts, 4 permanent jobs, 5 student placements, 7 freelancer services, 32 academy courses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase migration complete and tested. All MongoDB functionality now uses Supabase PostgreSQL via supabase-py client. Key changes: 1) password field changed to hashed_password in users table, 2) All route functions are synchronous (not async) except file upload, 3) Data types stored as TEXT (dates are ISO strings). All 20 tables created and seeded. The sidebar has duplicate data-testid elements (mobile+desktop) - use is_visible() to find the desktop version. API URL: https://payroll-master-26.preview.emergentagent.com/api

key_changes: All data types stored as TEXT
